mapper.select:
select * from subject_tbl
where subject_category = 1
where subject_category = 2
where subject_category = 3
and subject_level = 1
and subject_level = 2
and subject_level = 3
and subject_title like '%'||#{keyword}||'%'
order by subject_no asc
order by subject_level asc
order by subject_level desc
order by subject_count asc
order by subject_count desc

select * from subject_tbl
where subject_level = 1
where subject_level = 2
where subject_level = 3
